As AI agents begin transacting on behalf of businesses, payments need more than speed. They need trust, controls, and clear rules for how value moves. We're helping build the infrastructure for trusted agent-driven payments, with the XRP Ledger and $RLUSD helping lay the foundation for the future of commerce. We're pleased to be part of the ecosystem supporting @Mastercard's Agent Pay for Machines initiative, helping validate new use cases, establish common rules, and accelerate adoption.

@0xPolygon 發布穩定幣結算指南，主張可用四層模型把即時終局性、週末支付與低成本結算接入既有支付堆疊。

研究筆記：支付基礎設施與穩定幣結算是高訊號主題，可追蹤 Polygon 如何服務企業支付與 OMS 場景。

Most payment stacks weren't built for real-time finality, weekend payouts, or sub-cent settlement. But the fix isn't a rebuild. We put together a guide on the four-layer model for adding stablecoin settlement to the stack you already run. Download it: https://info.polygon.technology/oms-stablecoins-guide?utm_source=X&utm_medium=Organic_social&utm_campaign=OMS_Stablecoin_Guide_Q2_2026&utm_content=report

研究筆記：Backpack 將傳統資產與加密交易整合，對 Solana 生態金融產品與合規交易入口具觀察價值。

Asia's financial landscape might be fragmented, but Kaia is unifying it onchain. Xangle's latest report explores the Kaia flywheel, connecting local stablecoins, RWAs, and robust DeFi infrastructure to build a true onchain capital market. A must-read deep dive.

post_id: 2064256241120239897
@@KaiaChain
2026-06-09 05:27:07 GMT
公鏈stablecoinoriginalhigh

Kaia 指出鏈上 FX 編排可降低企業財務避險中的傳統瓶頸，並以穩定幣結算取代部分遠期合約需求。

研究筆記：Kaia 將企業財務避險與 onchain FX 編排、穩定幣結算連結，強調傳統遠期合約與資產負債表浮動資金可被鏈上結算層替代。

Treasury hedging is a legacy bottleneck. Moving this to an onchain FX orchestration layer (like @RatioFX) removes the need for balance sheet float. Settlement happens via stablecoins instead of forward contracts.
Open post
post_id: 2064217707181195731
@@KaiaChain
2026-06-09 05:25:46 GMT
公鏈stablecoinoriginalhigh

Kaia 認為穩定幣真正的落地關鍵在結算，尤其是亞洲市場以 24/7 即時結算替代傳統 FX 通道。

研究筆記：此貼延續 Kaia 對亞洲支付與穩定幣結算場景的敘事，將重點從交易轉向後台結算與跨境 FX corridor 替代。

Settlement is the actual endgame. Most of the noise has always been about trading, but when the back office moves to stablecoins, that's when we'll see true change. For us in Asia, that looks like replacing legacy FX corridors with instant, 24/7 settlement.

Eligible BEP2 assets can still be migrated to BNB Smart Chain, but recovery times increase as the tool phases out. Kaia 評論 PoS 資產 ETF 中分配質押收益的稅務與監管摩擦，認為若能順利處理，可能為其他 PoS 資產打開同類產品空間。

研究筆記：此貼涉及 PoS ETF、質押收益與監管框架，對公鏈金融化與機構產品敘事有追蹤價值。

It will be interesting to see how these issuers handle the tax and regulatory friction of distributing staking rewards within a traditional ETF wrapper. If they crack the seamless distribution of yield, it opens the door for every other PoS asset.

post_id: 2064162601412829269
@KaiaChain
01:45:10 GMT
公鏈replyreplynormal

Kaia 強調零售場景中結算速度的重要性，並指出即時支付軌道若嵌入 super-app，才更可能觸達不熟悉跨鏈橋的一般消費者。

研究筆記：此貼涉及消費級支付、即時結算與 super-app 分發場景，可作為 Kaia 消費金融敘事觀察。

Settlement speed is the only metric that matters for retail. Real-time rails are a prerequisite, but the real win is where those rails land. Putting that flow inside a super-app is how you actually hit a consumer who doesn't know what a bridge is.

post_id: 2064018155157233774
@LayerZero_Core
16:13:24 GMT
項目originaloriginalhigh

LayerZero 說明與 Cardano 的大型互操作部署路線，將分階段推出端點、Stargate、開發者工具與產品整合。

研究筆記：跨鏈互操作與 Cardano 生態連接屬重大項目路線更新。

Crypto's next phase will not be won by isolated ecosystems. The largest interoperability deployment in Cardano's history is coming. Earlier this year, we announced that all of crypto would be connected to Cardano via LayerZero, creating a path for over 800 tokens to natively expand into the Cardano ecosystem. The complex technical work will roll out in phases, from testnet and mainnet endpoints, to Stargate, to developer tooling that makes it easy for anyone to deploy, to product integrations across the entire LayerZero stack. By the end of this year, any asset will be able to deploy on Cardano. While this work is in flight, we'll be teaming up with the Cardano teams to share more behind the scenes: a detailed roadmap, a deep dive on our partnership, and co-hosted digital and IRL events for the community. We're excited for what this work means for both LayerZero and Cardano, and can't wait to share more in the coming weeks. A connected Cardano. Done right.

Sui 圍繞 confidential transfers 公測說明隱私轉帳、合規可見性、審計與金融工作流應用。

研究筆記：Sui 隱私轉帳公測涉及機構採用、合規與鏈上支付隱私，具持續追蹤價值。

This removes a structural barrier. Institutions, fintechs, payment platforms & apps that need controlled visibility have a path forward: the upside of a public chain, without exposing flows. Visible where it should be. Confidential where it needs to be. Auditable when required.
Open post
post_id: 2064016216579293368
@SuiNetwork
16:06:25 GMT
公鏈replyreplyhigh

Sui 圍繞 confidential transfers 公測說明隱私轉帳、合規可見性、審計與金融工作流應用。

研究筆記：Sui 隱私轉帳公測涉及機構採用、合規與鏈上支付隱私，具持續追蹤價值。

With this: → Sender/receiver address & token type stay visible as txn occurs → Transfer amounts & balances become confidential → Authorized parties maintain access through defined policies → Audit trails remain intact All while public and private transfers remain as-is.
Open post
post_id: 2064016204411662720
@SuiNetwork
16:06:22 GMT
公鏈replyreplyhigh

Sui 圍繞 confidential transfers 公測說明隱私轉帳、合規可見性、審計與金融工作流應用。

研究筆記：Sui 隱私轉帳公測涉及機構採用、合規與鏈上支付隱私，具持續追蹤價值。

Confidential transfers change that. The amount inside is sealed. People can still see who sent and received the envelope, but not how much. Importantly, the issuer decides who can open the envelope, so an issuer, exchange, or regulator can access important info when needed.

BNB Chain 強調評估 AI 專案不應只看數量，而要看是否能完成批准、付款、執行任務與留下鏈上紀錄的端到端流程。

Counting how many AI projects sit on a chain misses the point. The real test is how many can finish a full job: get the go-ahead, pay, run the task, leave a record. BNB Chain runs that whole sequence end to end. Full case https://www.bnbchain.org/en/blog/bnb-chain-building-the-infrastructure-base-for-the-ai-agent-economy

Introducing the Night Sky Accelerator Program Midnight’s NEW 10-week accelerator for early-stage teams building privacy-first solutions designed for scale. Night Sky is designed to find and support the teams building that future. Selected founders will receive: Technical integration Fundraising support Commercialization & growth guidance Wide Midnight Ecosystem access Investor exposure through Pitch Day Capital allocation from @midnightfdn Built for ambitious teams across Web2, Web3, and adjacent ecosystems. Solana 分享 0xSoju 對 Dynamic Assets 的願景，主張讓現有市場無法交易的資產能在 Solana 與 Sunrise 合作下被交易。

研究筆記：明確涉及 Solana 資產發行與交易範式擴張，對 RWA、長尾資產與鏈上交易市場敘事有較高研究價值。

.@0xSoju shares his vision for Dynamic Assets on Solana “We need to make sure that Solana is the best place to trade all crypto assets. We have already achieved that with our current partnership and it has been a delight to work with the Sunrise team” “But in order to truly make a difference, we need to make things tradable that are not tradable anywhere in the world. Not in any other L1, not in the traditional finance system, not on any chain or centralized exchange” “That I think is what Dynamic Assets is about with Sunrise”

post_id: 2063900765807128981
@KaiaChain
06:32:47 GMT
公鏈replyreplynormal

KaiaChain 回覆指出，加密資產被傳統金融接受不等於真正整合；若清算與結算管線未被替換，仍只是舊系統中的新資產類別。

研究筆記：可作為 RWA、穩定幣與鏈上金融基礎設施敘事素材，重點在傳統金融結算層與鏈上原語的差距。

We know where the gap is, acceptance. Usually just means ETFs and custody, not actual integration. Until the plumbing of settlement and clearing is replaced, it's just a new asset class in an old system.
Open post
post_id: 2063871845368254513
@KaiaChain
06:30:52 GMT
公鏈replyreplyhigh

KaiaChain 認為市場重心正從投機資產轉向能替代傳統金融管線的鏈上原語，永續合約與穩定幣只是全球流動性遷移的入口。

研究筆記：與鏈上金融基礎設施、全球流動性遷移及穩定幣敘事高度相關，可列入精選追蹤。

The shift is moving from purely speculative assets to primitives that actually replace legacy financial plumbing. Perps and stablecoins are just the entry point for a much broader migration of global liquidity.
Open post
post_id: 2063871363585294612
@KaiaChain
06:25:19 GMT
公鏈replyreplyhigh

KaiaChain 表示真正突破在於打通金融孤島，例如用代幣化存款即時結算 RWA 抵押品，從而消除機構資金 T+2 延遲。

研究筆記：RWA、代幣化存款與即時結算主題清晰，適合追蹤機構資金鏈上化敘事。

The real unlock happens when these silos merge. Think of using tokenized deposits for instant settlement of RWA collateral. That's the only way to actually eliminate the T+2 lag for institutional capital.

Polygon 發布本週生態重點，涵蓋 Mastercard 穩定幣結算、Bitso USDC 支付、Uniswap 單日交易量、JPYC 成長、WalletConnect USDT 支付、Open Money Stack 技術預覽，以及穩定幣交易量與主網出塊時間優化。

Here's what you missed this week on Polygon: ■ @Mastercard launches always-on stablecoin settlement on Polygon ■ @Bitso integrates USDC payments on Polygon ■ @Uniswap hits $100M+ protocol volume on Polygon in 24 hours ■ @jpyc_jp crosses $74M on Polygon in May, its strongest month ever ■ @WalletConnect launches USDT payments on Polygon ■ @symbiosis_fi crosses 2.5x Polygon volume from Feb to May ■ Polygon launches technical preview for the Open Money Stack ■ Polygon crosses $79.25B stablecoin volume in May ■ Polygon hits $2.6T in lifetime stablecoin value moved ■ Polygon mainnet block time reduced to 1.5s, down from 1.75s

15:02:00 GMT
公鏈weekly-ecosystem-recaporiginalhigh

Sei Network 回顧 Tech Week 與近期生態進展，包括與 Mastercard 白皮書預告、Monaco Trading 與 Fhenix 研究合作、Messari 提及 Sei RWA 季增 350%、Giga roadmap 解讀及 Envio indexer 教學。

研究筆記：此貼文彙整 Sei 在金融、RWA、機密交易基礎設施、路線圖與開發者工具上的多項進展，適合作為公鏈生態週報與 RWA 敘事追蹤素材。

After a week alongside the brightest in tech and finance. One thing is clear: Sei keeps coming up. Here's what you missed at @Techweek_ and more ↓ Sei and @Mastercard gave a first look at the joint whitepaper to the crowd at NY Tech Week, ahead of the public release: https://t.co/SGZxgGaI3q @MonacoTrading announced a research partnership with @fhenix focused on confidential onchain trading infrastructure: https://t.co/9ZMfBY2EcT @MessariCrypto dropped their Q1 state of blockchains, highlighting +350% QoQ RWA growth on Sei: https://t.co/4NlWBdQqaG @TokenRelations broke down the recently released Sei Giga roadmap: https://t.co/XzXmC5Eutb @sumvin and Sei rang in Tech Week with friends from all corners of AI and finance: https://t.co/FrHK5QlQFp @envio_indexer published a step-by-step guide to spin up an indexer and power your app on Sei with real-time data in minutes: https://t.co/W7mcQ3iGa5 Markets Move Faster on Sei. ($/acc)

Open post
post_id: 2063623336664436829
@solana
14:00:01 GMT
公鏈weekly-ecosystem-recaporiginalhigh

Solana 發布本週生態彙整，涵蓋 Mastercard 穩定幣結算、Backpack tokenized brokerage、Solana Foundation 訂閱與授權功能、RWA 資金流入 7.16 億美元，以及多個支付、AI、收藏品、隱私、金融和遊戲項目進展。

研究筆記：這是高密度 Solana 生態週報，集中呈現機構支付、RWA、tokenized equities、開發者工具與消費應用進展，適合作為公鏈熱點與項目追蹤主素材。

Mastercard introduced always-on stablecoin settlement on Solana, Backpack announced a tokenized brokerage, and $716M of RWA capital flowed in last month, more than any other network. While the market looked one way, the institutions and builders kept shipping. Here’s everything that happened: Headline News - @Mastercard introduced always-on stablecoin settlement on Solana - @Backpack announced Backpack Securities, merging traditional brokerage with Solana-native tokenization - @SolanaFndn launched native Subscriptions and Allowances for delegated spending and recurring billing Launches - @moonpay introduced the MoonAgents Desktop App, connecting ChatGPT or Claude so AI agents can pay onchain - @sunrisedefi, @MeteoraAG and @BedrockFndn teamed to launch Dynamic Assets - @SolanaFndn announced dedicated support for teams building fully onchain perpetuals and supporting infrastructure - @bulktrade activated Season 1 with pre-deposits now open - @ORE deployed a quantum-safe smart wallet to secure ORE holder and staking assets from quantum threats - @craftsdev introduced equity-linked tokens, enabling onchain exposure to real company outcomes - @useDecal debuted Decal Treasury, featuring automated yield engine that funds integrated corporate loyalty programs - @axelar went live on Solana to enable cross-chain messaging and programmable asset transfers - @PhoenixTrade launched mobile trading and cross-chain deposits - @raikucom activated rkuSOL, an LST that routes three distinct streams of AOT and JIT auction revenue back to stakers - @JupiterExchange rolled out TCG credit features on Jupiter Offerbook, utilizing @phygitals and @Collector_Crypt - @moonshot released Moonshot Packs, bringing physical trading card experience onchain - @packs_supply launched a collectibles SOV that rewards stakers with physical packs - @Paytrie expanded the Canadian dollar stablecoin to Solana - @strongholdpay expanded its SHx token network to Solana via @axelar - @paj_cash debuted v2 of its payment platform, enabling account-based Web3 off-ramps - @lava_xyz released Lava Card, a zero-annual-fee Visa debit card - @Dyadnum launched a WhatsApp-native trade engine to streamline cross-chain asset routing - @UmbraPrivacy launched its privacy-focused web interface - @zodial_xyz shipped a portfolio-margin lending protocol - @Certora formally verified Solana’s P-token upgrade - @MonkeFoundry opened Cohort 2 applications, closing June 12 - @BitRobotNetwork announced applications for its robotics laboratory program - @jaileddotfun launched Jailed, an onchain prison simulator game deployed on Solana - @gachasports shipped a sports-led gacha platform - @predikt_gg announced bringing cross-market access and leverage to @solana prediction market users - @rektdrinks released SOL Berry, a Solana-themed sparkling water Milestones - @solana led onchain collectibles markets with ~60% of total volume - @Raydium crossed $2B in cumulative trading volume for tokenized equities - Solana recorded the largest RWAs net capital inflow across chains in May crossing $716M - @KASTxyz won Best Digital Assets Fintech at BeInCrypto Institutional 100 Awards - @kamino's xStocks market surpassed $30M in total market size - @solanamobile crossed 1K live apps on the dApp Store - @helium_mobile, the consumer carrier built on Helium's Solana-based network, was acquired by Andrew Yang's @joinnoblemobil If you enjoyed this week’s newsletter, please share it with an RT.

post_id: 2063157980368162994
@KaiaChain
06:00:02 GMT
公鏈stablecoinsquotehigh

Kaia 引用 JPYC 採用分析，指出日本受監管穩定幣的重點正從發行量轉向鏈上資本實際使用；Kaia 稱其為 JPYC 第二大網路，流通量超過 2.5 億並朝 3 億成長。

研究筆記：Kaia 引用 JPYC 採用分析，指出日本受監管穩定幣的重點正從發行量轉向鏈上資本實際使用；Kaia 稱其為 JPYC 第二大網路，流通量超過 2.5 億並朝 3 億成長。

An excellent analysis by @FourPillarsFP @xparadigms on the accelerating adoption of JPYC, and the work done by @noritaka_okabe and the @jpyc_official team. The transition from absolute issuance to functional onchain capital is the true indicator of product-market fit for regulated stablecoins in Japan. As the regulatory landscape evolves to support settlement hubs and machine-to-machine payments, robust underlying infrastructure becomes critical. We are seeing this institutional and retail demand materialize directly onchain. Kaia is currently the second-largest network for JPYC with over 250M+ in circulating supply, and the trajectory toward 300M is rapidly accelerating. Through our integration with @unifi_x, we are capturing a significant share of this growth to support the next phase of programmable money in Asia. The foundation for Japan's onchain economy is being built right now. Stablecoins flow smoother on @KaiaChain.

Sui 發布週度生態回顧，涵蓋 ViaBTC、NAVI、CME、Current、Yoso、WaterX 與 Doppel Games 等多個基礎設施、DeFi、預測市場與遊戲進展。

研究筆記：Sui 發布週度生態回顧，涵蓋 ViaBTC、NAVI、CME、Current、Yoso、WaterX 與 Doppel Games 等多個基礎設施、DeFi、預測市場與遊戲進展。

The Sui ecosystem is actively expanding the boundaries of onchain utility. Here is the weekly recap: • ViaBTC celebrated their 10th anniversary of delivering transparent, secure mining infrastructure to users in over 150 countries. Congratulations to the team. • @navi_protocol achieved a major milestone by operating for over 1,000 consecutive days on the network, solidifying their status as a resilient cornerstone of DeFi liquidity. • @CMEGroup went live with 24/7 trading for crypto futures and options, recording $151.4B in total May notional volume with $23.7B traded in the Sui suite. • Moonshot project @CurrentSUI became the first protocol on the network to earn institutional-grade coverage from @NexusMutual, setting a new benchmark for DeFi asset insurance. • @yososocial is officially migrating to Sui and entering their beta stage, leveraging the native object-centric design to run fast-cycle prediction markets without app congestion. • AI-native trading engine @WaterX_app launched their World Cup 2026 predictive campaign, allowing users to back global teams and unlock mystery boxes on June 12. • Onchain gaming studio @doppelgamesco kicked off their Texas Gold em Series 5 Grand Final featuring simulated high-stakes matchups on goldem .trade.

Polygon 宣傳 Open Money Stack 的意圖式跨鏈支付路由，主軸是讓使用者只看到一次付款確認，底層自動處理跨鏈、橋接與場館路由。

研究筆記：Polygon 宣傳 Open Money Stack 的意圖式跨鏈支付路由，主軸是讓使用者只看到一次付款確認，底層自動處理跨鏈、橋接與場館路由。

Your user taps pay. They see one confirmation. The dollar crosses whatever chains, bridges, and venues it needs to. They never see any of it. This is how payments work on the Open Money Stack: https://polygon.technology/learn/payment/how-intent-based-payment-routing-works-for-cross-chain-money-movement

TRON announced the spot listing of TRX, the native utility token of the TRON network, on @Bitnomial, a CFTC-regulated U.S. exchange and clearinghouse. The listing expands access to TRX for U.S. market participants through a regulated trading venue, providing investors and institutions with an additional platform to access the native utility token of the TRON blockchain. TRX supports transactions, smart contract execution, decentralized applications, and network governance across one of the world's most active blockchain ecosystems. More details from @TheBlockCo

XLayerOfficial 發布穩定幣、支付、跨鏈流動性或資金流動基礎設施相關進展，值得追蹤採用與合作。

研究筆記：XLayerOfficial 發布穩定幣、支付、跨鏈流動性或資金流動基礎設施相關進展，值得追蹤採用與合作。

Uniswap V4 Hooks Winners: First Place - @Eulr_Official Eulr is a fair token launchpad with no presales & team allocations, where onchain rules prevent price crashes. Second Place - @HatchAI_App, @PolicyPoolHQ HatchAI is token launchpad that automatically protects new projects from sniper bots and whale dumps through built-in pool-level safeguards. PolicyPool is a trading pool with programmable rules, where oversized trades either get blocked or are routed through a mechanism that rewards liquidity providers first. Third Place - @FanVibeOnX, @4lpha_agent, @RouletteSwap FanVibe Hook is a World Cup prediction market that connects fan activity directly to DeFi liquidity behavior in real time. 4lpha AI is an AI agent that manages your liquidity positions autonomously, rebalancing and compounding within the risk limits you set. RouletteSwap is a trading pool where users can opt into a high-variance fee structure, paying the same expected cost over time, with a chance at near-zero fees or a big spike. (3/4)
Open post
post_id: 2062647624642199982
@XLayerOfficial
21:28:07 GMT
公鏈paymentsthreadhigh

XLayerOfficial 發布穩定幣、支付、跨鏈流動性或資金流動基礎設施相關進展，值得追蹤採用與合作。

研究筆記：XLayerOfficial 發布穩定幣、支付、跨鏈流動性或資金流動基礎設施相關進展，值得追蹤採用與合作。

X Cup Winners: First Place - @Billion_Global Billion Live lets you watch live traders and copy their moves in one tap, without leaving the stream. Second Place - @ShieldSuite_, @PlayWorldXI ShieldSuite is a no-loss World Cup player speculation platform where deposits stay safe in yield while an AI agent trades player shares on your behalf. WorldXI lets you build your dream World Cup squad onchain, earn points based on real match performance, and compete on a fully transparent leaderboard. Third Place - @choice_markets, @cupfolio, @Polygoal_market Choice Market turns any trending topic or social debate into a tradeable prediction market instantly. CupFolio is an AI-managed portfolio that autonomously optimizes your World Cup predictions like a fund. Polygoal is a decentralized World Cup prediction market where fans predict match outcomes and exact scores, with trustless settlements. (2/4)

Applications for Founder House London are now open. Founder House is a three-day, in-person builder program starting on July 10th designed for founders looking to launch their business on the Arbitrum Platform. Selected teams will get: - Opportunity to compete for $300K in prizes + grants - Access to infrastructure, product and GTM support - Mentorship from @RobinhoodApp Chain, @awscloud, @Offchain, Arbitrum Foundation and industry leaders If you're building programmable payments, RWAs, DeFi, AI, privacy or consumer apply below.

The core loop: money comes in as cash or a bank wire, converts to stablecoins, moves where it needs to go, and comes back out as fiat. Settlements that used to take days now take minutes. Fees that used to cost dollars now cost fractions of a penny.

$RLUSD is institutional-grade infrastructure for payments and tokenization. Through @wormhole’s Native Token Transfers (NTT), $RLUSD can now move natively across multiple blockchain ecosystems, supporting cross-border payments, institutional on/off-ramps, and tokenization use cases. For developers and institutions building onchain, that expands access to compliant, USD-backed liquidity across supported networks.

Exposure to crypto is one thing. Building structure for serious capital to hold it, manage it, and participate is another. @gbartsmith knows it, from Susquehanna’s crypto desk to strategy & capital deployment at @avat_co. And he's speaking at Summit: https://www.avalanchesummit.com/ He brings a Wall Street market structure lens to blockchain's most important open question: How does a speculative asset class become institutional financial infrastructure? That conversation is happening at Avalanche Summit. Sept 16-17 in New York City.

KaiaChain 評論穩定幣抵押品設計，指出擴張限制在於抵押品選擇而非去中心化本身，並以 Sky 的 RWA 抵押作為突破純加密抵押上限的案例。

研究筆記：KaiaChain 評論穩定幣抵押品設計，指出擴張限制在於抵押品選擇而非去中心化本身，並以 Sky 的 RWA 抵押作為突破純加密抵押上限的案例。

The scaling constraint sits with the collateral choice, not decentralization itself. ETH-collateralized stables hit the ceiling Ignas describes. They need ETH to pump. Sky cleared that ceiling years ago by adding RWA-backed collateral. The constraint is specific to pure-crypto-collateral designs.
Open post
post_id: 2062382972012261509
@KaiaChain
03:49:49 GMT
公鏈stablecoinoriginalmedium

KaiaChain 討論品牌穩定幣碎片化，認為若各金融科技公司都發行穩定幣，發行將商品化，跨品牌穩定幣交換層仍有競爭空間。

研究筆記：KaiaChain 討論品牌穩定幣碎片化，認為若各金融科技公司都發行穩定幣，發行將商品化，跨品牌穩定幣交換層仍有競爭空間。

Yes, and the implication is that issuance becomes the commodity layer. If every fintech launches one, none of them gets to be "the" onchain dollar. The category fragments along distribution lines. M0 wins issuance, and the interchange layer between branded stables is still open.

This is where Summit belongs. And so do you. Tickets: https://www.avalanchesummit.com/ For two days, Avalanche Summit brings together the founders, community, institutions, developers, and operators building blockchain for real markets, real assets, and real businesses. X Layer 說明 Exchange OS 將分階段開放，未來支援現貨、永續、結果市場、合規框架、預言機與費用模型。

Exchange OS is being introduced in stages. Over time, developers will gain access to the full infrastructure stack enabling deployment for spot, perps, outcome markets with custom compliance frameworks, oracle integrations, and fee models. Read the whitepaper: https://t.co/XpiBj1CiRH (3/3)
Open post
post_id: 2062192182715695392
@XLayerOfficial
15:18:21 GMT
公鏈paymentsthreadhigh

X Layer 介紹 Exchange OS 的雙層設計：EVM 作為信任根，TradeZone 提供高效撮合與免 gas 執行。

研究筆記：X Layer 介紹 Exchange OS 的雙層設計：EVM 作為信任根，TradeZone 提供高效撮合與免 gas 執行。

Think of Exchange OS as two coordinated layers: • X Layer EVM is the root of trust. Deposits, withdrawals, and staking remain fully onchain, ensuring no centralized operator controls user assets. • X Layer TradeZone is the performance engine, enabling millisecond matching, 300K TPS throughput, and gas-free execution. For Outcome Markets, a designated third-party oracle resolves each match result at settlement and closes all positions at once, no continuous price feeds needed. Both layers remain synchronized through the protocol native state synchronization architecture. (2/3)

post_id: 2062186699317453068
@LayerZero_Core
14:56:34 GMT
公鏈tokenomicsoriginalhigh

LayerZero 更新 ZRO 敘事與數據，稱回購與機構吸收已佔供應 19.77%，並強調生態價值將回流至 ZRO。

研究筆記：LayerZero 更新 ZRO 敘事與數據，稱回購與機構吸收已佔供應 19.77%，並強調生態價值將回流至 ZRO。

ZRO Updates More ZRO has been bought back and locked up than sold into the market. Institutions and buybacks have taken 19.77% of supply in 18 months, while 63.8% of ZRO unlocked to investors still has not moved. $112.7M has gone into ZRO buybacks since September 2025, one of the largest programs in crypto. ZRO is the only asset in the LayerZero ecosystem. All economic value from Zero, LayerZero, and Stargate flows back to it. Every token expresses a view. ZRO first was that there would be many chains, no single winner, and value would accrue to whatever connected them. Now LayerZero has moved $267B across 165 chains. The next view is bigger. Money and markets are the two largest waves finance will ever see, and both are already onchain. Zero was built for this moment. Coming this fall.

Midnight 發布 Midnight Expert，這是一組面向 Claude 的 AI skills，能理解 Compact、SDK、本地 devnet、測試流程與 Midnight 開發模式，並透過編譯、執行與型別檢查驗證輸出。

研究筆記：此內容對追蹤區塊鏈開發者 AI 工具、可驗證程式碼生成與 Midnight 生態建設具有高價值。

Building with AI tools as a blockchain developer often means fighting hallucinations, broken code, and documentation gaps. Midnight Expert takes a different approach. Built for Midnight developers, Midnight Expert is a suite of AI skills for Claude that understands Compact, the SDK, local devnets, testing workflows, and Midnight development patterns. Instead of relying on confident guesses, it can verify outputs by actually compiling, running, type-checking, and inspecting code.

post_id: 2062118015420834053
@KaiaChain
10:20:22 GMT
公鏈originaloriginalhigh

Kaia 分析 SoFi stablecoin 的意義，指出這是從美國銀行體系內部發行，而非在銀行旁平行運作，監管、準備金與 Fed payment access 由同一機構承接。

研究筆記：此內容適合追蹤穩定幣監管、銀行體系發行模式與支付基礎設施演進。

SoFi's stablecoin is the first one issued from inside the US banking system, not alongside it. Tether, Circle, PayPal built stablecoin operations parallel to banks. A national bank issuing one means the regulatory stack, the reserves, and Fed payment access sit inside one institution.

post_id: 2062117178812613088

公鏈originaloriginalhigh

BNB Chain 發布代幣化股票框架文章，指出相關基礎設施比市場報導更成熟，但仍存在資金路徑與 DeFi 整合缺口。

研究筆記：此內容適合追蹤 BNB Chain 在 RWA、代幣化股票與 DeFi 基礎設施敘事上的布局。

The infrastructure behind tokenized equities is further along than most coverage suggests, and further behind than the volume numbers imply. Full framework, the data, and where the gaps are https://www.bnbchain.org/en/blog/the-next-step-for-tokenized-equities-funding-paths-matter-after-assets-move-onchain
Open post
post_id: 2062086359721099752
@BNBCHAIN
08:17:51 GMT
公鏈originaloriginalhigh

BNB Chain 指出抵押品層是代幣化股票進入 DeFi 的關鍵瓶頸，並點名 BUIDL、BENJI、VBILL 等產品提供借貸、保證金與收益策略基礎。

研究筆記：此內容對追蹤 RWA 抵押品層、代幣化證券可組合性與鏈上金融產品設計具有研究價值。

The collateral layer is where most DeFi integration breaks down. BUIDL, BENJI, and VBILL are the products doing the real work here, giving tokenized equities a base to borrow against, post as margin, or use in yield strategies. Without a functioning collateral layer, an asset sits onchain but cannot move through DeFi in any meaningful way. It becomes a price tracker, not a financial instrument. Most current products are still at that stage.
Open post
post_id: 2062086347746418876
@BNBCHAIN
08:17:47 GMT
公鏈originaloriginalhigh

BNB Chain 比較 xStocks 與 Ondo GM 等代幣化股票產品，強調價格追蹤與總回報產品在抵押模型、機制和 DeFi 用途上並不相同。

研究筆記：此內容有助於分析代幣化股票產品結構差異，以及不同 RWA 產品在 DeFi 中的可用性。

Not all tokenized stocks are the same product. xStocks tracks price only, 1:1 collateralized, Ondo GM captures total return including dividends and corporate actions. Different collateral models, different mechanics, different DeFi use cases. This matters because the functionality a product supports depends directly on how it is structured. A price tracker and a total return product are not interchangeable, even if they reference the same underlying asset.
Open post
post_id: 2062086331703218457
@BNBCHAIN
08:17:43 GMT
公鏈originaloriginalhigh

BNB Chain 表示 BSC 是少數能大規模衡量代幣化股票交易量的鏈，並提到 Ondo Global Markets 累計 DEX 交易量已超過 50 億美元。

研究筆記：此內容適合追蹤 BSC 在 RWA 交易量、DEX 流動性與錢包可及性方面的競爭定位。

BSC is one of the few places where tokenized equity volume is measurable at scale. The cumulative DEX volume of @OndoFinance Global Markets crossed crossed $5B. That volume exists because infrastructure layers are in place, not just listed assets. DEX liquidity and wallet access are further along on BSC than most other chains. https://t.co/z3y1TEa99R (Source: @DefiLlama)
Open post
post_id: 2062086313768304874
@BNBCHAIN
08:17:40 GMT
公鏈originaloriginalhigh

BNB Chain 將代幣化股票基礎設施拆解為發行、抵押品、DEX 流動性、錢包接入與 KYC 五層，並指出抵押品與 DeFi 可組合性仍是主要缺口。

研究筆記：此內容可用於建立 RWA 基礎設施分析框架，尤其適合追蹤代幣化股票的 DeFi 可用性。

Getting both user types to the same asset requires 5 layers working in sequence: 1. Asset issuance 2. A collateral layer 3. DEX liquidity 4. Wallet access 5. KYC where the product needs it Most current products cover two or three of these well but very few cover all five. The gaps tend to fall in the same places: collateral and DeFi composability. Those are also the two layers that determine whether a tokenized equity is useful inside DeFi or just a price tracker sitting onchain.
Open post
post_id: 2062086301994885201
@BNBCHAIN
08:17:37 GMT
公鏈originaloriginalhigh

BNB Chain 指出代幣化股票使用者可能來自券商帳戶或穩定幣錢包，兩種資金路徑需要不同基礎設施，決定產品可觸達的市場範圍。

研究筆記：此內容對追蹤 RWA 使用者入口、資金路徑與產品適配問題具有參考價值。

Not everyone entering tokenized equity markets arrives the same way. One user comes from a brokerage account whilst another holds stablecoins in a wallet. The same asset, but completely different infrastructure requirements behind each. That split is where most products run into trouble. Building for one type of user while ignoring the other means the product works for a narrow slice of the market. Funding paths determine who can actually use what is being built.
Open post
post_id: 2062086289965683090
@BNBCHAIN
08:17:34 GMT
公鏈originaloriginalhigh

BNB Chain 開啟代幣化股票主題串，指出市場已從概念驗證轉向資金路徑、產品結構與 DeFi 功能化基礎設施問題。

研究筆記：此內容是 BNB Chain RWA 與代幣化股票敘事的主線，適合追蹤其對鏈上金融基礎設施的觀點。

Tokenized equities are live and past proof of concept, the debate has moved on. What the market is working through now is the infrastructure layer: funding paths, product structure, and what it actually takes for these assets to function inside DeFi. A breakdown

BNBCHAIN 強調 BSC 透過多次硬分叉改善速度與成本，支撐高頻鏈上應用。

研究筆記：此內容對追蹤 BNBCHAIN 生態敘事、產品動態或鏈上應用發展具參考價值。

BSC’s speed and fee improvements are part of the story too. Major hardforks (Pascal, Lorentz, Maxwell, and Fermi) helped reduce block times and lower transaction costs, creating stronger rails for high-volume apps, transfers, trading and everyday onchain activity. Fast and low-cost remains one of BSC’s biggest advantages.

Sui 列出後續協議升級方向，包括強化 epoch 結束韌性、調整 storage rebate 規則與 AI 驗證日誌分析。

研究筆記：此為 Sui 對主網停擺後技術修復與韌性提升的重點資訊。

Protocol upgrades: • Harden end-of-epoch resilience paths. • Overhaul legacy storage rebate rules. • Maximize automated AI validation log analysis. Read the full post-mortem here: https://blog.sui.io/sui-mainnet-halts-resolved-after-major-upgrade/
Open post
post_id: 2061861052229489026
@SuiNetwork
17:22:34 GMT
公鏈replyreplyhigh

Sui 說明停擺核心原因，包含 v1.72 gas smashing 邏輯錯誤與 DKG 狀態未正確清理。

研究筆記：此內容對追蹤 Sui 事故根因、協議風險與修復優先級具高參考價值。

Core causes: • Halts 1 & 2: A bug in v1.72 gas smashing logic generated an unintended negative delta on a zero balance for concurrent txs. • Halt 3: An epoch change stalled because Distributed Key Gen (DKG) states did not clear properly
Open post
post_id: 2061861040217026634
@SuiNetwork
17:22:31 GMT
公鏈replyreplyhigh

Sui 表示事故未造成資金風險，與高流量或惡意攻擊無關，交易已恢復亞秒級 finality。

研究筆記：此為 Sui 官方事故狀態與風險聲明，對安全與營運監測重要。

Data & status: • No funds were at risk. • The incidents had zero relation to high traffic or malicious exploits. • Transactions have safely returned to sub-second finality with normal throughput metrics.

Tickets here: https://www.avalanchesummit.com/ Axiym is building next-generation financial infrastructure for real-time funding, post-pay settlement, and stablecoin-powered payments within regulated financial ecosystems. For businesses, that means a path beyond slow settlement, trapped capital, and legacy cross-border payment rails. At Summit, hear from the operators and institutions building the systems that can actually move money faster, more transparently, and with the compliance controls modern finance requires. If payments are where you think blockchain becomes useful, you need to be at Avalanche Summit. Sept 16–17 | New York City

研究筆記：Arbitrum 明確面向企業金融場景，強調可預測結算、即時市場與客製化環境，對追蹤機構級 L2 產品定位具參考價值。

Finance is becoming programmable. For enterprises, that means faster workflows, predictable settlement and markets that adapt in real time. The Arbitrum Platform is powering this shift with open infrastructure, sub-second performance, predictable costs and customizable environments built around how businesses already operate.

Kaia 將 off-ramp 卡與消費卡視為穩定幣使用者漏斗的兩個階段，前者導入使用者，後者承接日常支出。

研究筆記：Kaia 將 off-ramp 卡與消費卡視為穩定幣使用者漏斗的兩個階段，對支付卡、穩定幣入口與消費轉化敘事有參考價值。

The two markets read better as two stages of one journey. Off-ramp cards at $800 are how users get into stablecoins. Spending cards at ~$48-$168 are how they use them once they feel native. The categories are sequential in a user funnel, with off-ramp feeding spending downstream.

Sui 在協議層永久移除支援穩定幣轉帳的 Gas Token 需求，這是原生設計而非促銷或補貼。

研究筆記：Sui 在協議層永久移除支援穩定幣轉帳的 Gas Token 需求，這是原生設計而非促銷或補貼。

The question is no longer if stablecoins are used, but how they move. Sui's answer: the gas token requirement has been removed from supported stablecoin transfers — at the protocol level. Not a subsidy. Not a promo. Just how Sui works now.

As AI agents begin transacting on behalf of businesses, payments need more than speed. They need trust, controls, and clear rules for how value moves. We're helping build the infrastructure for trusted agent-driven payments, with the XRP Ledger and $RLUSD helping lay the foundation for the future of commerce. We're pleased to be part of the ecosystem supporting @Mastercard's Agent Pay for Machines initiative, helping validate new use cases, establish common rules, and accelerate adoption.

@0xPolygon 發布穩定幣結算指南，主張可用四層模型把即時終局性、週末支付與低成本結算接入既有支付堆疊。

研究筆記：支付基礎設施與穩定幣結算是高訊號主題，可追蹤 Polygon 如何服務企業支付與 OMS 場景。

Most payment stacks weren't built for real-time finality, weekend payouts, or sub-cent settlement. But the fix isn't a rebuild. We put together a guide on the four-layer model for adding stablecoin settlement to the stack you already run. Download it: https://info.polygon.technology/oms-stablecoins-guide?utm_source=X&utm_medium=Organic_social&utm_campaign=OMS_Stablecoin_Guide_Q2_2026&utm_content=report

Polygon 發布本週生態重點，涵蓋 Mastercard 穩定幣結算、Bitso USDC 支付、Uniswap 單日交易量、JPYC 成長、WalletConnect USDT 支付、Open Money Stack 技術預覽，以及穩定幣交易量與主網出塊時間優化。

Here's what you missed this week on Polygon: ■ @Mastercard launches always-on stablecoin settlement on Polygon ■ @Bitso integrates USDC payments on Polygon ■ @Uniswap hits $100M+ protocol volume on Polygon in 24 hours ■ @jpyc_jp crosses $74M on Polygon in May, its strongest month ever ■ @WalletConnect launches USDT payments on Polygon ■ @symbiosis_fi crosses 2.5x Polygon volume from Feb to May ■ Polygon launches technical preview for the Open Money Stack ■ Polygon crosses $79.25B stablecoin volume in May ■ Polygon hits $2.6T in lifetime stablecoin value moved ■ Polygon mainnet block time reduced to 1.5s, down from 1.75s

Sei Network 回顧 Tech Week 與近期生態進展，包括與 Mastercard 白皮書預告、Monaco Trading 與 Fhenix 研究合作、Messari 提及 Sei RWA 季增 350%、Giga roadmap 解讀及 Envio indexer 教學。

研究筆記：此貼文彙整 Sei 在金融、RWA、機密交易基礎設施、路線圖與開發者工具上的多項進展，適合作為公鏈生態週報與 RWA 敘事追蹤素材。

After a week alongside the brightest in tech and finance. One thing is clear: Sei keeps coming up. Here's what you missed at @Techweek_ and more ↓ Sei and @Mastercard gave a first look at the joint whitepaper to the crowd at NY Tech Week, ahead of the public release: https://t.co/SGZxgGaI3q @MonacoTrading announced a research partnership with @fhenix focused on confidential onchain trading infrastructure: https://t.co/9ZMfBY2EcT @MessariCrypto dropped their Q1 state of blockchains, highlighting +350% QoQ RWA growth on Sei: https://t.co/4NlWBdQqaG @TokenRelations broke down the recently released Sei Giga roadmap: https://t.co/XzXmC5Eutb @sumvin and Sei rang in Tech Week with friends from all corners of AI and finance: https://t.co/FrHK5QlQFp @envio_indexer published a step-by-step guide to spin up an indexer and power your app on Sei with real-time data in minutes: https://t.co/W7mcQ3iGa5 Markets Move Faster on Sei. ($/acc)

post_id: 2063623336664436829
@solana
14:00:01 GMT
公鏈weekly-ecosystem-recaporiginalhigh

Solana 發布本週生態彙整，涵蓋 Mastercard 穩定幣結算、Backpack tokenized brokerage、Solana Foundation 訂閱與授權功能、RWA 資金流入 7.16 億美元，以及多個支付、AI、收藏品、隱私、金融和遊戲項目進展。

研究筆記：這是高密度 Solana 生態週報，集中呈現機構支付、RWA、tokenized equities、開發者工具與消費應用進展，適合作為公鏈熱點與項目追蹤主素材。

Mastercard introduced always-on stablecoin settlement on Solana, Backpack announced a tokenized brokerage, and $716M of RWA capital flowed in last month, more than any other network. While the market looked one way, the institutions and builders kept shipping. Here’s everything that happened: Headline News - @Mastercard introduced always-on stablecoin settlement on Solana - @Backpack announced Backpack Securities, merging traditional brokerage with Solana-native tokenization - @SolanaFndn launched native Subscriptions and Allowances for delegated spending and recurring billing Launches - @moonpay introduced the MoonAgents Desktop App, connecting ChatGPT or Claude so AI agents can pay onchain - @sunrisedefi, @MeteoraAG and @BedrockFndn teamed to launch Dynamic Assets - @SolanaFndn announced dedicated support for teams building fully onchain perpetuals and supporting infrastructure - @bulktrade activated Season 1 with pre-deposits now open - @ORE deployed a quantum-safe smart wallet to secure ORE holder and staking assets from quantum threats - @craftsdev introduced equity-linked tokens, enabling onchain exposure to real company outcomes - @useDecal debuted Decal Treasury, featuring automated yield engine that funds integrated corporate loyalty programs - @axelar went live on Solana to enable cross-chain messaging and programmable asset transfers - @PhoenixTrade launched mobile trading and cross-chain deposits - @raikucom activated rkuSOL, an LST that routes three distinct streams of AOT and JIT auction revenue back to stakers - @JupiterExchange rolled out TCG credit features on Jupiter Offerbook, utilizing @phygitals and @Collector_Crypt - @moonshot released Moonshot Packs, bringing physical trading card experience onchain - @packs_supply launched a collectibles SOV that rewards stakers with physical packs - @Paytrie expanded the Canadian dollar stablecoin to Solana - @strongholdpay expanded its SHx token network to Solana via @axelar - @paj_cash debuted v2 of its payment platform, enabling account-based Web3 off-ramps - @lava_xyz released Lava Card, a zero-annual-fee Visa debit card - @Dyadnum launched a WhatsApp-native trade engine to streamline cross-chain asset routing - @UmbraPrivacy launched its privacy-focused web interface - @zodial_xyz shipped a portfolio-margin lending protocol - @Certora formally verified Solana’s P-token upgrade - @MonkeFoundry opened Cohort 2 applications, closing June 12 - @BitRobotNetwork announced applications for its robotics laboratory program - @jaileddotfun launched Jailed, an onchain prison simulator game deployed on Solana - @gachasports shipped a sports-led gacha platform - @predikt_gg announced bringing cross-market access and leverage to @solana prediction market users - @rektdrinks released SOL Berry, a Solana-themed sparkling water Milestones - @solana led onchain collectibles markets with ~60% of total volume - @Raydium crossed $2B in cumulative trading volume for tokenized equities - Solana recorded the largest RWAs net capital inflow across chains in May crossing $716M - @KASTxyz won Best Digital Assets Fintech at BeInCrypto Institutional 100 Awards - @kamino's xStocks market surpassed $30M in total market size - @solanamobile crossed 1K live apps on the dApp Store - @helium_mobile, the consumer carrier built on Helium's Solana-based network, was acquired by Andrew Yang's @joinnoblemobil If you enjoyed this week’s newsletter, please share it with an RT.

Sui 發布週度生態回顧，涵蓋 ViaBTC、NAVI、CME、Current、Yoso、WaterX 與 Doppel Games 等多個基礎設施、DeFi、預測市場與遊戲進展。

研究筆記：Sui 發布週度生態回顧，涵蓋 ViaBTC、NAVI、CME、Current、Yoso、WaterX 與 Doppel Games 等多個基礎設施、DeFi、預測市場與遊戲進展。

The Sui ecosystem is actively expanding the boundaries of onchain utility. Here is the weekly recap: • ViaBTC celebrated their 10th anniversary of delivering transparent, secure mining infrastructure to users in over 150 countries. Congratulations to the team. • @navi_protocol achieved a major milestone by operating for over 1,000 consecutive days on the network, solidifying their status as a resilient cornerstone of DeFi liquidity. • @CMEGroup went live with 24/7 trading for crypto futures and options, recording $151.4B in total May notional volume with $23.7B traded in the Sui suite. • Moonshot project @CurrentSUI became the first protocol on the network to earn institutional-grade coverage from @NexusMutual, setting a new benchmark for DeFi asset insurance. • @yososocial is officially migrating to Sui and entering their beta stage, leveraging the native object-centric design to run fast-cycle prediction markets without app congestion. • AI-native trading engine @WaterX_app launched their World Cup 2026 predictive campaign, allowing users to back global teams and unlock mystery boxes on June 12. • Onchain gaming studio @doppelgamesco kicked off their Texas Gold em Series 5 Grand Final featuring simulated high-stakes matchups on goldem .trade.

公鏈paymentsthreadhigh

XLayerOfficial 發布穩定幣、支付、跨鏈流動性或資金流動基礎設施相關進展，值得追蹤採用與合作。

研究筆記：XLayerOfficial 發布穩定幣、支付、跨鏈流動性或資金流動基礎設施相關進展，值得追蹤採用與合作。

Uniswap V4 Hooks Winners: First Place - @Eulr_Official Eulr is a fair token launchpad with no presales & team allocations, where onchain rules prevent price crashes. Second Place - @HatchAI_App, @PolicyPoolHQ HatchAI is token launchpad that automatically protects new projects from sniper bots and whale dumps through built-in pool-level safeguards. PolicyPool is a trading pool with programmable rules, where oversized trades either get blocked or are routed through a mechanism that rewards liquidity providers first. Third Place - @FanVibeOnX, @4lpha_agent, @RouletteSwap FanVibe Hook is a World Cup prediction market that connects fan activity directly to DeFi liquidity behavior in real time. 4lpha AI is an AI agent that manages your liquidity positions autonomously, rebalancing and compounding within the risk limits you set. RouletteSwap is a trading pool where users can opt into a high-variance fee structure, paying the same expected cost over time, with a chance at near-zero fees or a big spike. (3/4)

Applications for Founder House London are now open. Founder House is a three-day, in-person builder program starting on July 10th designed for founders looking to launch their business on the Arbitrum Platform. Selected teams will get: - Opportunity to compete for $300K in prizes + grants - Access to infrastructure, product and GTM support - Mentorship from @RobinhoodApp Chain, @awscloud, @Offchain, Arbitrum Foundation and industry leaders If you're building programmable payments, RWAs, DeFi, AI, privacy or consumer apply below.

$RLUSD is institutional-grade infrastructure for payments and tokenization. Through @wormhole’s Native Token Transfers (NTT), $RLUSD can now move natively across multiple blockchain ecosystems, supporting cross-border payments, institutional on/off-ramps, and tokenization use cases. For developers and institutions building onchain, that expands access to compliant, USD-backed liquidity across supported networks.

Exposure to crypto is one thing. Building structure for serious capital to hold it, manage it, and participate is another. @gbartsmith knows it, from Susquehanna’s crypto desk to strategy & capital deployment at @avat_co. And he's speaking at Summit: https://www.avalanchesummit.com/ He brings a Wall Street market structure lens to blockchain's most important open question: How does a speculative asset class become institutional financial infrastructure? That conversation is happening at Avalanche Summit. Sept 16-17 in New York City.

KaiaChain 介紹 Featherlend 作為 vault curator 進入 Kaia，強調主動償付能力監控、零壞帳紀錄與更安全的風險調整收益。

Sustainable yield starts with capital protection. Powered by active solvency monitoring with a flawless track record of zero bad debt, @Featherlend is bringing the safest risk-adjusted yields to Kaia as a vault curator. That means more ways to maximize your capital.

Exchange OS is being introduced in stages. Over time, developers will gain access to the full infrastructure stack enabling deployment for spot, perps, outcome markets with custom compliance frameworks, oracle integrations, and fee models. Read the whitepaper: https://t.co/XpiBj1CiRH (3/3)
Open post
post_id: 2062192182715695392
@XLayerOfficial
15:18:21 GMT
公鏈paymentsthreadhigh

X Layer 介紹 Exchange OS 的雙層設計：EVM 作為信任根，TradeZone 提供高效撮合與免 gas 執行。

研究筆記：X Layer 介紹 Exchange OS 的雙層設計：EVM 作為信任根，TradeZone 提供高效撮合與免 gas 執行。

Think of Exchange OS as two coordinated layers: • X Layer EVM is the root of trust. Deposits, withdrawals, and staking remain fully onchain, ensuring no centralized operator controls user assets. • X Layer TradeZone is the performance engine, enabling millisecond matching, 300K TPS throughput, and gas-free execution. For Outcome Markets, a designated third-party oracle resolves each match result at settlement and closes all positions at once, no continuous price feeds needed. Both layers remain synchronized through the protocol native state synchronization architecture. (2/3)

post_id: 2062186699317453068
@LayerZero_Core
14:56:34 GMT
公鏈tokenomicsoriginalhigh

LayerZero 更新 ZRO 敘事與數據，稱回購與機構吸收已佔供應 19.77%，並強調生態價值將回流至 ZRO。

研究筆記：LayerZero 更新 ZRO 敘事與數據，稱回購與機構吸收已佔供應 19.77%，並強調生態價值將回流至 ZRO。

ZRO Updates More ZRO has been bought back and locked up than sold into the market. Institutions and buybacks have taken 19.77% of supply in 18 months, while 63.8% of ZRO unlocked to investors still has not moved. $112.7M has gone into ZRO buybacks since September 2025, one of the largest programs in crypto. ZRO is the only asset in the LayerZero ecosystem. All economic value from Zero, LayerZero, and Stargate flows back to it. Every token expresses a view. ZRO first was that there would be many chains, no single winner, and value would accrue to whatever connected them. Now LayerZero has moved $267B across 165 chains. The next view is bigger. Money and markets are the two largest waves finance will ever see, and both are already onchain. Zero was built for this moment. Coming this fall.

BSC’s speed and fee improvements are part of the story too. Major hardforks (Pascal, Lorentz, Maxwell, and Fermi) helped reduce block times and lower transaction costs, creating stronger rails for high-volume apps, transfers, trading and everyday onchain activity. Fast and low-cost remains one of BSC’s biggest advantages.

Global payments are overdue for an upgrade. @AxiymFinance is building that upgrade on Avalanche. And Axiym Co-Founder & CBO Farhad Rassul will be at Avalanche Summit NYC to explain how. Tickets here: https://www.avalanchesummit.com/ Axiym is building next-generation financial infrastructure for real-time funding, post-pay settlement, and stablecoin-powered payments within regulated financial ecosystems. For businesses, that means a path beyond slow settlement, trapped capital, and legacy cross-border payment rails. At Summit, hear from the operators and institutions building the systems that can actually move money faster, more transparently, and with the compliance controls modern finance requires. If payments are where you think blockchain becomes useful, you need to be at Avalanche Summit. Sept 16–17 | New York City

Kaia 將 off-ramp 卡與消費卡視為穩定幣使用者漏斗的兩個階段，前者導入使用者，後者承接日常支出。

研究筆記：Kaia 將 off-ramp 卡與消費卡視為穩定幣使用者漏斗的兩個階段，對支付卡、穩定幣入口與消費轉化敘事有參考價值。

The two markets read better as two stages of one journey. Off-ramp cards at $800 are how users get into stablecoins. Spending cards at ~$48-$168 are how they use them once they feel native. The categories are sequential in a user funnel, with off-ramp feeding spending downstream.

The full announcement:

@@Ripple
2026-06-10 13:46:57 GMT
公鏈paymentsquotehigh

@Ripple 分享 Mastercard Agent Pay for Machines 相關進展，涵蓋機器支付、支付規則與鏈上結算基礎設施。

研究筆記：此則涉及支付、消費採用或明確數據訊號，值得追蹤後續合作落地與鏈上使用量。

As AI agents begin transacting on behalf of businesses, payments need more than speed. They need trust, controls, and clear rules for how value moves. We're helping build the infrastructure for trusted agent-driven payments, with the XRP Ledger and $RLUSD helping lay the foundation for the future of commerce. We're pleased to be part of the ecosystem supporting @Mastercard's Agent Pay for Machines initiative, helping validate new use cases, establish common rules, and accelerate adoption.

@0xPolygon 發布穩定幣結算指南，主張可用四層模型把即時終局性、週末支付與低成本結算接入既有支付堆疊。

研究筆記：支付基礎設施與穩定幣結算是高訊號主題，可追蹤 Polygon 如何服務企業支付與 OMS 場景。

Most payment stacks weren't built for real-time finality, weekend payouts, or sub-cent settlement. But the fix isn't a rebuild. We put together a guide on the four-layer model for adding stablecoin settlement to the stack you already run. Download it: https://info.polygon.technology/oms-stablecoins-guide?utm_source=X&utm_medium=Organic_social&utm_campaign=OMS_Stablecoin_Guide_Q2_2026&utm_content=report

@@arbitrum
2026-06-10 08:00:09 GMT
公鏈infrastructureoriginalhigh

@arbitrum 對比 L1 與 L2，強調 Arbitrum One 已連接以太坊生態、160 億美元以上安全經濟價值、數百萬用戶與 1000 多個應用。

研究筆記：L2 企業市場定位與生態流動性是高訊號主題，可追蹤其與新 L1 或 appchain 敘事的競爭。

L1 or L2? Acquiring users, liquidity, and market share is often the deciding factor for businesses. L1: Bootstrap users, liquidity and apps from zero. L2: Connect to @Ethereum's ecosystem via Arbitrum One's $16B+ in secured economic value, millions of users and 1,000+ apps. The fastest path to growth is building where the market already exists.

post_id: 2064618608949690862

公鏈rwaoriginalhigh

@BNBCHAIN 指出非穩定幣 RWA 資產在 2026 年 5 月突破 260 億美元，並關注現有基礎設施能否承載後續資金流。

研究筆記：RWA 規模增長與鏈上資產基礎設施承載能力是高訊號主題，可追蹤後續資產類型與流動性。

Non-stablecoin RWA assets passed $26B in May 2026, with tokenized stocks and ETFs contributing to that growth alongside Treasuries. The infrastructure question is whether what has been built can actually handle the capital flows the numbers suggest are coming. Full breakdown

@KaiaChain 強調亞洲跨境支付正從傳統通道轉向穩定幣結算，凸顯 settlement rail 的採用價值。

研究筆記：穩定幣、支付或結算採用是高訊號金融基礎設施進展，值得追蹤實際規模與合作方。

Testament that the shift is in the settlement. What we're seeing is that institutions aren't just "using" the rails, they're moving the actual plumbing of Asian cross-border payments to stablecoins because the legacy corridors are too slow.
Open post
post_id: 2064556666105028815
@@KaiaChain
2026-06-10 03:52:45 GMT
公鏈rwaoriginalhigh

@KaiaChain 討論 RWA 收益與抵押品缺口風險，指出波動資產需要不同的清算引擎。

研究筆記：RWA 與抵押品風險討論涉及鏈上金融風控與產品設計，可追蹤後續資產類型與清算機制。

The risk is always in the collateral gap. Most RWA yield is still just Treasury wrappers. Moving into volatile assets requires a different liquidation engine if you want to avoid the forced sales we're seeing here.

公鏈paymentsoriginalhigh

@0xPolygon 說明 Open Money Stack 的 smart sessions，可用一次批准支援訂閱、支付與結帳等非託管錢包場景。

研究筆記：支付、錢包與授權體驗是鏈上採用的重要入口，值得追蹤實際整合與用戶轉換。

Every payment needs a wallet signature. Fine for a one-off purchase. For subscriptions, payouts, and checkouts, every additional prompt loses customers. Smart sessions fix that with one approval. How it works on the wallet layer of the Open Money Stack: https://polygon.technology/blog/run-recurring-subscriptions-payouts-and-checkouts-on-a-non-custodial-wallet-with-one-customer-approval-via-the-open-money-stack

Kaia 引用 Xangle 報告，強調以本地穩定幣、RWA 與 DeFi 基礎設施連接亞洲金融市場，形成鏈上資本市場飛輪。

研究筆記：此貼聚焦 Kaia 的亞洲鏈上金融敘事，涵蓋穩定幣、RWA、DeFi 與資本市場基礎設施，屬高訊號內容。

Asia's financial landscape might be fragmented, but Kaia is unifying it onchain. Xangle's latest report explores the Kaia flywheel, connecting local stablecoins, RWAs, and robust DeFi infrastructure to build a true onchain capital market. A must-read deep dive.

Arbitrum 宣布參與 WAIB Summit Monaco，討論配置者如何評估數位資產與支撐可程式化經濟的基礎設施。

研究筆記：此貼涉及機構配置、數位資產基礎設施與活動曝光，對 Arbitrum 的機構敘事有追蹤價值。

Join us at WAIB Summit Monaco today. Hear from @ItsBrendanMa on how allocators are evaluating digital assets and the infrastructure powering the programmable economy.
Open post
post_id: 2064256241120239897
@@KaiaChain
2026-06-09 05:27:07 GMT
公鏈stablecoinoriginalhigh

Kaia 指出鏈上 FX 編排可降低企業財務避險中的傳統瓶頸，並以穩定幣結算取代部分遠期合約需求。

研究筆記：Kaia 將企業財務避險與 onchain FX 編排、穩定幣結算連結，強調傳統遠期合約與資產負債表浮動資金可被鏈上結算層替代。

Treasury hedging is a legacy bottleneck. Moving this to an onchain FX orchestration layer (like @RatioFX) removes the need for balance sheet float. Settlement happens via stablecoins instead of forward contracts.
Open post
post_id: 2064217707181195731
@@KaiaChain
2026-06-09 05:25:46 GMT
公鏈stablecoinoriginalhigh

Kaia 認為穩定幣真正的落地關鍵在結算，尤其是亞洲市場以 24/7 即時結算替代傳統 FX 通道。

研究筆記：此貼延續 Kaia 對亞洲支付與穩定幣結算場景的敘事，將重點從交易轉向後台結算與跨境 FX corridor 替代。

Settlement is the actual endgame. Most of the noise has always been about trading, but when the back office moves to stablecoins, that's when we'll see true change. For us in Asia, that looks like replacing legacy FX corridors with instant, 24/7 settlement.

BNB Chain 提醒 Beacon Chain 資產持有者，Token Recovery Tool 第二階段將於 6 月 30 日結束，BEP2 資產仍可遷移至 BNB Smart Chain，但處理時間會隨工具退場而增加。

研究筆記：此貼涉及 BNB Beacon Chain 資產遷移與用戶資產恢復期限，屬高訊號基礎設施與資產安全更新。

Reminder for BNB Beacon Chain asset holders: Phase 2 of the Token Recovery Tool sunset ends June 30. Eligible BEP2 assets can still be migrated to BNB Smart Chain, but recovery times increase as the tool phases out. Read the blog for full info: https://www.bnbchain.org/en/blog/bnb-beacon-chain-token-recovery-tool-sunset-plan
Open post
post_id: 2064165615498129698
@KaiaChain
01:48:09 GMT
公鏈replyreplynormal

Kaia 評論 PoS 資產 ETF 中分配質押收益的稅務與監管摩擦，認為若能順利處理，可能為其他 PoS 資產打開同類產品空間。

研究筆記：此貼涉及 PoS ETF、質押收益與監管框架，對公鏈金融化與機構產品敘事有追蹤價值。

It will be interesting to see how these issuers handle the tax and regulatory friction of distributing staking rewards within a traditional ETF wrapper. If they crack the seamless distribution of yield, it opens the door for every other PoS asset.
Open post
post_id: 2064162601412829269
@KaiaChain
01:45:10 GMT
公鏈replyreplynormal

Kaia 強調零售場景中結算速度的重要性，並指出即時支付軌道若嵌入 super-app，才更可能觸達不熟悉跨鏈橋的一般消費者。

研究筆記：此貼涉及消費級支付、即時結算與 super-app 分發場景，可作為 Kaia 消費金融敘事觀察。

Settlement speed is the only metric that matters for retail. Real-time rails are a prerequisite, but the real win is where those rails land. Putting that flow inside a super-app is how you actually hit a consumer who doesn't know what a bridge is.

Capital formation (ICM) A new class of launchpad lets you tokenize equity and raise straight from a community, with the market deciding who breaks out: → @stardotfun — pitch live on a weekly show, prediction markets curate the raise → @MetaDAOProject — futarchy, where markets govern your funding and treasury → @craftsdev — sealed-bid auctions built for equity-backed offerings → @fairdotclub and @MeteoraAG's Bedrock — tokenized equity with onchain governance built in

TRON 強調其低成本高吞吐特性與 USDT 結算角色，並提到 Dune MCP 整合可用自然語言分析鏈上穩定幣活動。

研究筆記：穩定幣結算、Dune MCP 與鏈上資料分析是高訊號主題，適合列入精選追蹤。

The #TRON blockchain is optimized for low-cost, high-throughput transfers, making it a primary settlement layer for USDT activity across global markets. With @Dune's MCP server integration, natural language access to on-chain data makes it easier for users, analysts, and builders to explore TRON’s stablecoin activity and understand real-world settlement at scale. Sui 圍繞 confidential transfers 公測說明隱私轉帳、合規可見性、審計與金融工作流應用。

研究筆記：Sui 隱私轉帳公測涉及機構採用、合規與鏈上支付隱私，具持續追蹤價值。

This removes a structural barrier. Institutions, fintechs, payment platforms & apps that need controlled visibility have a path forward: the upside of a public chain, without exposing flows. Visible where it should be. Confidential where it needs to be. Auditable when required.
Open post
post_id: 2064016216579293368
@SuiNetwork
16:06:25 GMT
公鏈replyreplyhigh

Sui 圍繞 confidential transfers 公測說明隱私轉帳、合規可見性、審計與金融工作流應用。

研究筆記：Sui 隱私轉帳公測涉及機構採用、合規與鏈上支付隱私，具持續追蹤價值。

With this: → Sender/receiver address & token type stay visible as txn occurs → Transfer amounts & balances become confidential → Authorized parties maintain access through defined policies → Audit trails remain intact All while public and private transfers remain as-is.
Open post
post_id: 2064016204411662720
@SuiNetwork
16:06:22 GMT
公鏈replyreplyhigh

Sui 圍繞 confidential transfers 公測說明隱私轉帳、合規可見性、審計與金融工作流應用。

研究筆記：Sui 隱私轉帳公測涉及機構採用、合規與鏈上支付隱私，具持續追蹤價值。

Confidential transfers change that. The amount inside is sealed. People can still see who sent and received the envelope, but not how much. Importantly, the issuer decides who can open the envelope, so an issuer, exchange, or regulator can access important info when needed.

post_id: 2064016192285860200

BNB Chain 強調評估 AI 專案不應只看數量，而要看是否能完成批准、付款、執行任務與留下鏈上紀錄的端到端流程。

研究筆記：AI agent 經濟與鏈上支付、任務執行、可驗證紀錄敘事明確，適合列入精選追蹤。

Counting how many AI projects sit on a chain misses the point. The real test is how many can finish a full job: get the go-ahead, pay, run the task, leave a record. BNB Chain runs that whole sequence end to end. Full case https://www.bnbchain.org/en/blog/bnb-chain-building-the-infrastructure-base-for-the-ai-agent-economy

post_id: 2063907020487434272
@solana
08:52:33 GMT
公鏈originaloriginalhigh

Solana 分享 0xSoju 對 Dynamic Assets 的願景，主張讓現有市場無法交易的資產能在 Solana 與 Sunrise 合作下被交易。

研究筆記：明確涉及 Solana 資產發行與交易範式擴張，對 RWA、長尾資產與鏈上交易市場敘事有較高研究價值。

.@0xSoju shares his vision for Dynamic Assets on Solana “We need to make sure that Solana is the best place to trade all crypto assets. We have already achieved that with our current partnership and it has been a delight to work with the Sunrise team” “But in order to truly make a difference, we need to make things tradable that are not tradable anywhere in the world. Not in any other L1, not in the traditional finance system, not on any chain or centralized exchange” “That I think is what Dynamic Assets is about with Sunrise”

post_id: 2063900765807128981
@KaiaChain
06:32:47 GMT
公鏈replyreplynormal

KaiaChain 回覆指出，加密資產被傳統金融接受不等於真正整合；若清算與結算管線未被替換，仍只是舊系統中的新資產類別。

研究筆記：可作為 RWA、穩定幣與鏈上金融基礎設施敘事素材，重點在傳統金融結算層與鏈上原語的差距。

We know where the gap is, acceptance. Usually just means ETFs and custody, not actual integration. Until the plumbing of settlement and clearing is replaced, it's just a new asset class in an old system.
Open post
post_id: 2063871845368254513
@KaiaChain
06:30:52 GMT
公鏈replyreplyhigh

KaiaChain 認為市場重心正從投機資產轉向能替代傳統金融管線的鏈上原語，永續合約與穩定幣只是全球流動性遷移的入口。

研究筆記：與鏈上金融基礎設施、全球流動性遷移及穩定幣敘事高度相關，可列入精選追蹤。

The shift is moving from purely speculative assets to primitives that actually replace legacy financial plumbing. Perps and stablecoins are just the entry point for a much broader migration of global liquidity.
Open post
post_id: 2063871363585294612
@KaiaChain
06:25:19 GMT
公鏈replyreplyhigh

KaiaChain 表示真正突破在於打通金融孤島，例如用代幣化存款即時結算 RWA 抵押品，從而消除機構資金 T+2 延遲。

研究筆記：RWA、代幣化存款與即時結算主題清晰，適合追蹤機構資金鏈上化敘事。

The real unlock happens when these silos merge. Think of using tokenized deposits for instant settlement of RWA collateral. That's the only way to actually eliminate the T+2 lag for institutional capital.

Polygon 發布本週生態重點，涵蓋 Mastercard 穩定幣結算、Bitso USDC 支付、Uniswap 單日交易量、JPYC 成長、WalletConnect USDT 支付、Open Money Stack 技術預覽，以及穩定幣交易量與主網出塊時間優化。

研究筆記：高密度 Polygon 週報，集中呈現支付、穩定幣、DEX 交易量、日圓穩定幣與主網性能升級，可作為公鏈週報與穩定幣敘事素材。

Here's what you missed this week on Polygon: ■ @Mastercard launches always-on stablecoin settlement on Polygon ■ @Bitso integrates USDC payments on Polygon ■ @Uniswap hits $100M+ protocol volume on Polygon in 24 hours ■ @jpyc_jp crosses $74M on Polygon in May, its strongest month ever ■ @WalletConnect launches USDT payments on Polygon ■ @symbiosis_fi crosses 2.5x Polygon volume from Feb to May ■ Polygon launches technical preview for the Open Money Stack ■ Polygon crosses $79.25B stablecoin volume in May ■ Polygon hits $2.6T in lifetime stablecoin value moved ■ Polygon mainnet block time reduced to 1.5s, down from 1.75s

Sei Network 回顧 Tech Week 與近期生態進展，包括與 Mastercard 白皮書預告、Monaco Trading 與 Fhenix 研究合作、Messari 提及 Sei RWA 季增 350%、Giga roadmap 解讀及 Envio indexer 教學。

研究筆記：此貼文彙整 Sei 在金融、RWA、機密交易基礎設施、路線圖與開發者工具上的多項進展，適合作為公鏈生態週報與 RWA 敘事追蹤素材。

After a week alongside the brightest in tech and finance. One thing is clear: Sei keeps coming up. Here's what you missed at @Techweek_ and more ↓ Sei and @Mastercard gave a first look at the joint whitepaper to the crowd at NY Tech Week, ahead of the public release: https://t.co/SGZxgGaI3q @MonacoTrading announced a research partnership with @fhenix focused on confidential onchain trading infrastructure: https://t.co/9ZMfBY2EcT @MessariCrypto dropped their Q1 state of blockchains, highlighting +350% QoQ RWA growth on Sei: https://t.co/4NlWBdQqaG @TokenRelations broke down the recently released Sei Giga roadmap: https://t.co/XzXmC5Eutb @sumvin and Sei rang in Tech Week with friends from all corners of AI and finance: https://t.co/FrHK5QlQFp @envio_indexer published a step-by-step guide to spin up an indexer and power your app on Sei with real-time data in minutes: https://t.co/W7mcQ3iGa5 Markets Move Faster on Sei. ($/acc)
Open post
post_id: 2063637605724684773
@solana
14:00:01 GMT
公鏈weekly-ecosystem-recaporiginalhigh

Solana 發布本週生態彙整，涵蓋 Mastercard 穩定幣結算、Backpack tokenized brokerage、Solana Foundation 訂閱與授權功能、RWA 資金流入 7.16 億美元，以及多個支付、AI、收藏品、隱私、金融和遊戲項目進展。

研究筆記：這是高密度 Solana 生態週報，集中呈現機構支付、RWA、tokenized equities、開發者工具與消費應用進展，適合作為公鏈熱點與項目追蹤主素材。

Mastercard introduced always-on stablecoin settlement on Solana, Backpack announced a tokenized brokerage, and $716M of RWA capital flowed in last month, more than any other network. While the market looked one way, the institutions and builders kept shipping. Here’s everything that happened: Headline News - @Mastercard introduced always-on stablecoin settlement on Solana - @Backpack announced Backpack Securities, merging traditional brokerage with Solana-native tokenization - @SolanaFndn launched native Subscriptions and Allowances for delegated spending and recurring billing Launches - @moonpay introduced the MoonAgents Desktop App, connecting ChatGPT or Claude so AI agents can pay onchain - @sunrisedefi, @MeteoraAG and @BedrockFndn teamed to launch Dynamic Assets - @SolanaFndn announced dedicated support for teams building fully onchain perpetuals and supporting infrastructure - @bulktrade activated Season 1 with pre-deposits now open - @ORE deployed a quantum-safe smart wallet to secure ORE holder and staking assets from quantum threats - @craftsdev introduced equity-linked tokens, enabling onchain exposure to real company outcomes - @useDecal debuted Decal Treasury, featuring automated yield engine that funds integrated corporate loyalty programs - @axelar went live on Solana to enable cross-chain messaging and programmable asset transfers - @PhoenixTrade launched mobile trading and cross-chain deposits - @raikucom activated rkuSOL, an LST that routes three distinct streams of AOT and JIT auction revenue back to stakers - @JupiterExchange rolled out TCG credit features on Jupiter Offerbook, utilizing @phygitals and @Collector_Crypt - @moonshot released Moonshot Packs, bringing physical trading card experience onchain - @packs_supply launched a collectibles SOV that rewards stakers with physical packs - @Paytrie expanded the Canadian dollar stablecoin to Solana - @strongholdpay expanded its SHx token network to Solana via @axelar - @paj_cash debuted v2 of its payment platform, enabling account-based Web3 off-ramps - @lava_xyz released Lava Card, a zero-annual-fee Visa debit card - @Dyadnum launched a WhatsApp-native trade engine to streamline cross-chain asset routing - @UmbraPrivacy launched its privacy-focused web interface - @zodial_xyz shipped a portfolio-margin lending protocol - @Certora formally verified Solana’s P-token upgrade - @MonkeFoundry opened Cohort 2 applications, closing June 12 - @BitRobotNetwork announced applications for its robotics laboratory program - @jaileddotfun launched Jailed, an onchain prison simulator game deployed on Solana - @gachasports shipped a sports-led gacha platform - @predikt_gg announced bringing cross-market access and leverage to @solana prediction market users - @rektdrinks released SOL Berry, a Solana-themed sparkling water Milestones - @solana led onchain collectibles markets with ~60% of total volume - @Raydium crossed $2B in cumulative trading volume for tokenized equities - Solana recorded the largest RWAs net capital inflow across chains in May crossing $716M - @KASTxyz won Best Digital Assets Fintech at BeInCrypto Institutional 100 Awards - @kamino's xStocks market surpassed $30M in total market size - @solanamobile crossed 1K live apps on the dApp Store - @helium_mobile, the consumer carrier built on Helium's Solana-based network, was acquired by Andrew Yang's @joinnoblemobil If you enjoyed this week’s newsletter, please share it with an RT.

post_id: 2063157980368162994
@KaiaChain
06:00:02 GMT
公鏈stablecoinsquotehigh

Kaia 引用 JPYC 採用分析，指出日本受監管穩定幣的重點正從發行量轉向鏈上資本實際使用；Kaia 稱其為 JPYC 第二大網路，流通量超過 2.5 億並朝 3 億成長。

研究筆記：Kaia 引用 JPYC 採用分析，指出日本受監管穩定幣的重點正從發行量轉向鏈上資本實際使用；Kaia 稱其為 JPYC 第二大網路，流通量超過 2.5 億並朝 3 億成長。

An excellent analysis by @FourPillarsFP @xparadigms on the accelerating adoption of JPYC, and the work done by @noritaka_okabe and the @jpyc_official team. The transition from absolute issuance to functional onchain capital is the true indicator of product-market fit for regulated stablecoins in Japan. As the regulatory landscape evolves to support settlement hubs and machine-to-machine payments, robust underlying infrastructure becomes critical. We are seeing this institutional and retail demand materialize directly onchain. Kaia is currently the second-largest network for JPYC with over 250M+ in circulating supply, and the trajectory toward 300M is rapidly accelerating. Through our integration with @unifi_x, we are capturing a significant share of this growth to support the next phase of programmable money in Asia. The foundation for Japan's onchain economy is being built right now. Stablecoins flow smoother on @KaiaChain.

Sui 發布週度生態回顧，涵蓋 ViaBTC、NAVI、CME、Current、Yoso、WaterX 與 Doppel Games 等多個基礎設施、DeFi、預測市場與遊戲進展。

研究筆記：Sui 發布週度生態回顧，涵蓋 ViaBTC、NAVI、CME、Current、Yoso、WaterX 與 Doppel Games 等多個基礎設施、DeFi、預測市場與遊戲進展。

The Sui ecosystem is actively expanding the boundaries of onchain utility. Here is the weekly recap: • ViaBTC celebrated their 10th anniversary of delivering transparent, secure mining infrastructure to users in over 150 countries. Congratulations to the team. • @navi_protocol achieved a major milestone by operating for over 1,000 consecutive days on the network, solidifying their status as a resilient cornerstone of DeFi liquidity. • @CMEGroup went live with 24/7 trading for crypto futures and options, recording $151.4B in total May notional volume with $23.7B traded in the Sui suite. • Moonshot project @CurrentSUI became the first protocol on the network to earn institutional-grade coverage from @NexusMutual, setting a new benchmark for DeFi asset insurance. • @yososocial is officially migrating to Sui and entering their beta stage, leveraging the native object-centric design to run fast-cycle prediction markets without app congestion. • AI-native trading engine @WaterX_app launched their World Cup 2026 predictive campaign, allowing users to back global teams and unlock mystery boxes on June 12. • Onchain gaming studio @doppelgamesco kicked off their Texas Gold em Series 5 Grand Final featuring simulated high-stakes matchups on goldem .trade.

Your user taps pay. They see one confirmation. The dollar crosses whatever chains, bridges, and venues it needs to. They never see any of it. TRON announced the spot listing of TRX, the native utility token of the TRON network, on @Bitnomial, a CFTC-regulated U.S. exchange and clearinghouse. The listing expands access to TRX for U.S. market participants through a regulated trading venue, providing investors and institutions with an additional platform to access the native utility token of the TRON blockchain. TRX supports transactions, smart contract execution, decentralized applications, and network governance across one of the world's most active blockchain ecosystems. More details from @TheBlockCo

BNB Chain 引介 AnomaPay V1 作為新的私密支付選項，讓使用者在持有、轉帳與支付加密資產時降低餘額與交易紀錄外洩風險。

研究筆記：BNB Chain 引介 AnomaPay V1 作為新的私密支付選項，讓使用者在持有、轉帳與支付加密資產時降低餘額與交易紀錄外洩風險。

Another private payment option is now available for users on BNB Chain. @AnomaPay V1 lets users hold, transfer, and pay with crypto without exposing their balance or transaction history publicly. Note: This post is for informational purposes only and not financial advice. DYOR.

BNB Chain 引介 UnitasLabs 推出的 XGLD，主打以 XAUt 支持的收益型黃金資產，讓黃金曝險可透過策略產生收益。

研究筆記：BNB Chain 引介 UnitasLabs 推出的 XGLD，主打以 XAUt 支持的收益型黃金資產，讓黃金曝險可透過策略產生收益。

Gold has always been a store of value. Now, it can work harder on BNB Chain. @UnitasLabs launched XGLD, a yield-bearing gold asset backed by XAUt, giving users gold exposure with yield generated through Unitas strategies. Note: This post is for informational purposes only and not financial advice. DYOR.

Congratulations to all the winners, and to every builder who participated. The real challenge starts now: shipping, growing, and turning great ideas into products people actually use. The strongest ecosystems are built by builders, and this is only the beginning. (4/4)
Open post
post_id: 2062647636583497753
@XLayerOfficial
21:28:10 GMT
公鏈paymentsthreadhigh

XLayerOfficial 發布穩定幣、支付、跨鏈流動性或資金流動基礎設施相關進展，值得追蹤採用與合作。

研究筆記：XLayerOfficial 發布穩定幣、支付、跨鏈流動性或資金流動基礎設施相關進展，值得追蹤採用與合作。

Uniswap V4 Hooks Winners: First Place - @Eulr_Official Eulr is a fair token launchpad with no presales & team allocations, where onchain rules prevent price crashes. Second Place - @HatchAI_App, @PolicyPoolHQ HatchAI is token launchpad that automatically protects new projects from sniper bots and whale dumps through built-in pool-level safeguards. PolicyPool is a trading pool with programmable rules, where oversized trades either get blocked or are routed through a mechanism that rewards liquidity providers first. Third Place - @FanVibeOnX, @4lpha_agent, @RouletteSwap FanVibe Hook is a World Cup prediction market that connects fan activity directly to DeFi liquidity behavior in real time. 4lpha AI is an AI agent that manages your liquidity positions autonomously, rebalancing and compounding within the risk limits you set. RouletteSwap is a trading pool where users can opt into a high-variance fee structure, paying the same expected cost over time, with a chance at near-zero fees or a big spike. (3/4)
Open post
post_id: 2062647624642199982
@XLayerOfficial
21:28:07 GMT
公鏈paymentsthreadhigh

XLayerOfficial 發布穩定幣、支付、跨鏈流動性或資金流動基礎設施相關進展，值得追蹤採用與合作。

研究筆記：XLayerOfficial 發布穩定幣、支付、跨鏈流動性或資金流動基礎設施相關進展，值得追蹤採用與合作。

X Cup Winners: First Place - @Billion_Global Billion Live lets you watch live traders and copy their moves in one tap, without leaving the stream. Second Place - @ShieldSuite_, @PlayWorldXI ShieldSuite is a no-loss World Cup player speculation platform where deposits stay safe in yield while an AI agent trades player shares on your behalf. WorldXI lets you build your dream World Cup squad onchain, earn points based on real match performance, and compete on a fully transparent leaderboard. Third Place - @choice_markets, @cupfolio, @Polygoal_market Choice Market turns any trending topic or social debate into a tradeable prediction market instantly. CupFolio is an AI-managed portfolio that autonomously optimizes your World Cup predictions like a fund. Polygoal is a decentralized World Cup prediction market where fans predict match outcomes and exact scores, with trustless settlements. (2/4)

Applications for Founder House London are now open. Founder House is a three-day, in-person builder program starting on July 10th designed for founders looking to launch their business on the Arbitrum Platform. Selected teams will get: - Opportunity to compete for $300K in prizes + grants - Access to infrastructure, product and GTM support - Mentorship from @RobinhoodApp Chain, @awscloud, @Offchain, Arbitrum Foundation and industry leaders If you're building programmable payments, RWAs, DeFi, AI, privacy or consumer apply below.

The core loop: money comes in as cash or a bank wire, converts to stablecoins, moves where it needs to go, and comes back out as fiat. Settlements that used to take days now take minutes. Fees that used to cost dollars now cost fractions of a penny.

$RLUSD is institutional-grade infrastructure for payments and tokenization. Through @wormhole’s Native Token Transfers (NTT), $RLUSD can now move natively across multiple blockchain ecosystems, supporting cross-border payments, institutional on/off-ramps, and tokenization use cases. For developers and institutions building onchain, that expands access to compliant, USD-backed liquidity across supported networks.

Exposure to crypto is one thing. Building structure for serious capital to hold it, manage it, and participate is another. @gbartsmith knows it, from Susquehanna’s crypto desk to strategy & capital deployment at @avat_co. And he's speaking at Summit: https://www.avalanchesummit.com/ He brings a Wall Street market structure lens to blockchain's most important open question: How does a speculative asset class become institutional financial infrastructure? That conversation is happening at Avalanche Summit. Sept 16-17 in New York City.

Open post
post_id: 2062389405764268046
@KaiaChain
03:56:32 GMT
公鏈stablecoinoriginalmedium

KaiaChain 評論穩定幣抵押品設計，指出擴張限制在於抵押品選擇而非去中心化本身，並以 Sky 的 RWA 抵押作為突破純加密抵押上限的案例。

研究筆記：KaiaChain 評論穩定幣抵押品設計，指出擴張限制在於抵押品選擇而非去中心化本身，並以 Sky 的 RWA 抵押作為突破純加密抵押上限的案例。

The scaling constraint sits with the collateral choice, not decentralization itself. ETH-collateralized stables hit the ceiling Ignas describes. They need ETH to pump. Sky cleared that ceiling years ago by adding RWA-backed collateral. The constraint is specific to pure-crypto-collateral designs.
Open post
post_id: 2062382972012261509
@KaiaChain
03:49:49 GMT
公鏈stablecoinoriginalmedium

KaiaChain 討論品牌穩定幣碎片化，認為若各金融科技公司都發行穩定幣，發行將商品化，跨品牌穩定幣交換層仍有競爭空間。

研究筆記：KaiaChain 討論品牌穩定幣碎片化，認為若各金融科技公司都發行穩定幣，發行將商品化，跨品牌穩定幣交換層仍有競爭空間。

Yes, and the implication is that issuance becomes the commodity layer. If every fintech launches one, none of them gets to be "the" onchain dollar. The category fragments along distribution lines. M0 wins issuance, and the interchange layer between branded stables is still open.

公鏈infrastructureoriginalhigh

Sui 以試算表比喻說明物件中心架構，強調可平行更新、消除瓶頸並支援即時全球擴展。

研究筆記：Sui 以試算表比喻說明物件中心架構，強調可平行更新、消除瓶頸並支援即時全球擴展。

Legacy chains: a single spreadsheet cell updated one at a time; everyone has to wait. Sui: an entire spreadsheet updating independently, simultaneously, and in parallel. Object-centric architecture means zero bottlenecks and instant global scale.

Exchange OS is being introduced in stages. Over time, developers will gain access to the full infrastructure stack enabling deployment for spot, perps, outcome markets with custom compliance frameworks, oracle integrations, and fee models. Read the whitepaper: https://t.co/XpiBj1CiRH (3/3)

post_id: 2062192182715695392

15:18:21 GMT
公鏈paymentsthreadhigh

X Layer 介紹 Exchange OS 的雙層設計：EVM 作為信任根，TradeZone 提供高效撮合與免 gas 執行。

研究筆記：X Layer 介紹 Exchange OS 的雙層設計：EVM 作為信任根，TradeZone 提供高效撮合與免 gas 執行。

Think of Exchange OS as two coordinated layers: • X Layer EVM is the root of trust. Deposits, withdrawals, and staking remain fully onchain, ensuring no centralized operator controls user assets. • X Layer TradeZone is the performance engine, enabling millisecond matching, 300K TPS throughput, and gas-free execution. For Outcome Markets, a designated third-party oracle resolves each match result at settlement and closes all positions at once, no continuous price feeds needed. Both layers remain synchronized through the protocol native state synchronization architecture. (2/3)

@LayerZero_Core
14:56:34 GMT
公鏈tokenomicsoriginalhigh

LayerZero 更新 ZRO 敘事與數據，稱回購與機構吸收已佔供應 19.77%，並強調生態價值將回流至 ZRO。

研究筆記：LayerZero 更新 ZRO 敘事與數據，稱回購與機構吸收已佔供應 19.77%，並強調生態價值將回流至 ZRO。

ZRO Updates More ZRO has been bought back and locked up than sold into the market. Institutions and buybacks have taken 19.77% of supply in 18 months, while 63.8% of ZRO unlocked to investors still has not moved. $112.7M has gone into ZRO buybacks since September 2025, one of the largest programs in crypto. ZRO is the only asset in the LayerZero ecosystem. All economic value from Zero, LayerZero, and Stargate flows back to it. Every token expresses a view. ZRO first was that there would be many chains, no single winner, and value would accrue to whatever connected them. Now LayerZero has moved $267B across 165 chains. The next view is bigger. Money and markets are the two largest waves finance will ever see, and both are already onchain. Zero was built for this moment. Coming this fall.

研究筆記：此內容提供開發者資源入口，可追蹤 BNB Chain、Trust Wallet 與 CoinMarketCap 在 AI agent 工具鏈上的協作。

Ready to build? Start with these resources: • BNB AI Agent SDK: https://github.com/bnb-chain/bnbagent-sdk • Trust Wallet Agent Kit: https://portal.trustwallet.com/ • CMC AI Agent Hub: https://coinmarketcap.com/api/agent/ • BNB Hack Telegram: https://t.me/+MhiOLT0YUnlmNWFk

post_id: 2062143467539910938
@BNBCHAIN
12:04:49 GMT
公鏈originaloriginalhigh

BNB Chain 說明黑客松評審標準，Track 1 以實盤 PnL 與最大回撤衡量，Track 2 與特別獎則由評審看技術、原創性、實用性與 demo。

研究筆記：此內容有助於理解 AI trading agent 黑客松如何把鏈上交易表現與產品展示結合為評估標準。

Here’s how evaluation works • Track 1: judged by live PnL. Ranked on total return with a max drawdown cap. Most profit without blowing up • Track 2 and all special prizes: judged by a panel on technical execution, originality, real-world relevance and demo.

post_id: 2062134814556258461
@MidnightNtwrk
11:30:26 GMT
公鏈originaloriginalhigh

Midnight 發布 Midnight Expert，這是一組面向 Claude 的 AI skills，能理解 Compact、SDK、本地 devnet、測試流程與 Midnight 開發模式，並透過編譯、執行與型別檢查驗證輸出。

研究筆記：此內容對追蹤區塊鏈開發者 AI 工具、可驗證程式碼生成與 Midnight 生態建設具有高價值。

Building with AI tools as a blockchain developer often means fighting hallucinations, broken code, and documentation gaps. Midnight Expert takes a different approach. Built for Midnight developers, Midnight Expert is a suite of AI skills for Claude that understands Compact, the SDK, local devnets, testing workflows, and Midnight development patterns. Instead of relying on confident guesses, it can verify outputs by actually compiling, running, type-checking, and inspecting code.

post_id: 2062118015420834053
@KaiaChain
10:20:22 GMT
公鏈originaloriginalhigh

Kaia 分析 SoFi stablecoin 的意義，指出這是從美國銀行體系內部發行，而非在銀行旁平行運作，監管、準備金與 Fed payment access 由同一機構承接。

研究筆記：此內容適合追蹤穩定幣監管、銀行體系發行模式與支付基礎設施演進。

SoFi's stablecoin is the first one issued from inside the US banking system, not alongside it. Tether, Circle, PayPal built stablecoin operations parallel to banks. A national bank issuing one means the regulatory stack, the reserves, and Fed payment access sit inside one institution.

post_id: 2062097009075732716
@BNBCHAIN
